dict.string: Sweeply needs your location to show your position on the map and help you navigate to job sites.
Sweeply needs your location to show your position on the map and help you navigate to job sites, even when the app is in the background.
Sweeply sends reminders for upcoming jobs and overdue invoices so you never miss a beat.
Sweeply uses Face ID to protect your business data when the app lock is enabled.
